examples: She had tufty brown hair on her head and on her crotch, and if you used your fingers like forceps and reached up that mound of brown fluff.
"Ladies and gentlemen!" called the tufty-haired wizard. "If you would please stand up!"
The tufty-headed penguins headed out to sea at the onset of winter for their annual forage and returned on the following spring to breed.
You've got a tufty lawn, perfect for blackbirds.
